title: A2rchitech Expected Output Verification Schema
description: Schema for verifying workflow task outputs against frozen kernel VerifyArtifact contracts

passed.description: Whether verification passed, maps to VerifyArtifact.results.passed

confidence.description: Confidence level in verification, maps to VerifyArtifact.results.confidence

details.description: Detailed verification information, maps to VerifyArtifact.results.details

issue_type.description: Type of verification issue, maps to VerificationIssue.issue_type

description.description: Description of the verification issue, maps to VerificationIssue.description

severity.description: Severity level of the issue, maps to VerificationSeverity

location.description: Location of the issue, maps to VerificationIssue.location

issues.description: List of verification issues, maps to VerifyArtifact.results.issues
